title: Tech Disruptors: Booking.com on Global Demand, AI in Travel
title_cn: 技术颠覆者：Booking.com 的全球需求、人工智能在旅行中的应用
summary: “One of the things that’s been universally true ... is the human desire to travel is really strong. It’s very consistent,” says James Waters, chief business officer of Booking.com. Waters joins Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Nicole D’Souza on this episode of the Tech Disruptors podcast to discuss the outlook for global travel demand. They also explore the effect of macroeconomic and geopolitical trends on the industry and how Booking.com is using AI to enhance trip planning, customer service and

title_cn: 随着股价下跌，SpaceX 市值将蒸发 1 万亿美元
summary: SpaceX shares tumbled on Friday, putting the rocket and artificial intelligence giant on track to wipe out more than $1 trillion in market value from its all-time high.

title: Canada’s Open Banking Rollout Nears, but Don’t Expect a Revolution

summary: 40 years of pain haven’t stopped Burnham dreaming. The new Labour leader is certain he has a plan for all.

title: Merz Ally Triggers Accusations of Hypocrisy Over Surrogacy
title_cn: 梅尔兹盟友引发代孕虚伪指控
summary: A senior leader in Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s conservative party came under mounting pressure after the announcement that he’d fathered a child through a surrogate in the US sparked cries of hypocrisy.

title: US Stocks Decline as Traders Fear Another ‘DeepSeek Moment’
title_cn: 由于交易员担心另一个“DeepSeek 时刻”，美国股市下跌
summary: US stocks fell on Friday as semiconductor names dipped following the reveal of an artificial-intelligence model from a Chinese startup.

title: Chip Stocks Poised for Bear Market in AI Unwind: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 芯片股有望进入人工智能熊市：市场结束
summary: A selloff in chipmakers gathered pace on Friday, driving the group that has led this year’s stock rally toward a bear market on worries that the artificial-intelligence spending spree is becoming harder to justify.

title: Griffin Wants to Buy Old Cottage Across From New Citadel HQ
title_cn: 格里芬想购买新城堡总部对面的旧小屋
summary: Ken Griffin has gone to extraordinary lengths to assemble parcels of land around his planned Citadel headquarters in Miami, including buying up all 138 units in a condo building across the street.

title: Blue Owl-Backed Latigo Files for IPO, Adding to Biotech Pipeline
title_cn: Blue Owl 支持的 Latigo 申请首次公开募股，增加生物技术管道
summary: Latigo Biotherapeutics Inc. filed for an initial public offering, joining a growing list of biotechnology firms considering going public as soon as this quarter.

title: ‘Sea of Red’ Hits Emerging Stocks as AI Concerns Jolts Markets
title_cn: 人工智能担忧震撼市场，“红色海洋”冲击新兴股市
summary: Emerging-market stocks slumped, with a key gauge headed for a technical correction on mounting concerns the outlook for artificial intelligence no longer justifies the industry’s elevated valuations.

title: San Antonio to Borrow $944 Million for Major Airport Expansion
title_cn: 圣安东尼奥市将借款 9.44 亿美元用于主要机场扩建
summary: San Antonio, one of the fastest-growing US metro areas, is tapping the bond market for almost $1 billion as part of an ambitious program to expand and improve its airport.

title: Why the Moonshot Moment May Not Be a DeepSeek Moment
title_cn: 为什么登月时刻可能不是 DeepSeek 时刻
summary: History doesn’t always repeat itself.

title: Amundi Says Oil, Gas Crucial to EU’s Clean-Energy Transition
title_cn: Amundi表示石油、天然气对欧盟清洁能源转型至关重要
summary: Amundi SA wants the European Union to free asset managers to add oil and gas exposures to a new fund category intended to support the transition to a lower-carbon economy.

title: Gold Trims Weekly Drop on Dip-Buying Despite Rate Hike Odds
title_cn: 尽管加息可能性不大，黄金因逢低买入而收窄周跌幅
summary: Gold trimmed its weekly loss as some investors bought on dips after the precious metal broke below a key price level, even as escalating war tensions kept interest rate hike bets alive.

title: Telecom Italia Is Said to Consider €10.8 Billion Poste Bid Fair
title_cn: 据说意大利电信将考虑 108 亿欧元的邮政投标公平
summary: Telecom Italia SpA’s board is leaning toward endorsing Poste Italiane SpA’s €10.8 billion ($12.4 billion) takeover offer as fair, and is unlikely to seek a higher price, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 17
title_cn: 7 月 17 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil surged on growing fears the US and Iran could return to full war, threatening flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Foundever Strikes Deal With Creditors to Cut Debt Load
title_cn: 创始人与债权人达成协议以减轻债务负担
summary: Troubled business services giant Foundever Group has reached an agreement with a group of creditors to reduce its multi-billion dollar debt load, with the company’s controlling shareholder injecting fresh funds and installing new management.

title: Anglo Selects Penny’s Group as Preferred Bidder for De Beers
title_cn: Anglo 选择 Penny’s Group 作为戴比尔斯的首选竞标者
summary: Anglo American Plc has selected a group led by De Beers’ former boss Gareth Penny as the preferred bidder for its sale of the world’s biggest diamond mining company, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: Sweetgreen Pares 26% Drop as Parasite Tied to Taco Bell Lettuce
title_cn: 由于 Taco Bell 生菜上有寄生虫，Sweetgreen 的果皮下降了 26%
summary: Sweetgreen Inc. shares surged on Friday, halting a four-day skid, after US regulators said a parasite outbreak that’s sickened thousands across several states was traced to shredded iceberg lettuce served at Taco Bell restaurants.

title: European Stocks Drop on Mideast Escalation Fears, Tech Selloff
title_cn: 欧洲股市因中东局势升级担忧和科技股抛售而下跌
summary: European shares extended declines Friday as geopolitical tensions and a technology-stock selloff weighed on markets.

title: US Gasoline Prices Are Heading to $4 a Gallon Again
title_cn: 美国汽油价格再次升至每加仑 4 美元
summary: It’s the middle of summer driving season, when Americans typically embark on road trips and burn through millions of barrels of gasoline each day. They’ll be paying more for every fill up.

title: Crop Markets Mixed on Shipping Worries, US-China Trade Concerns
title_cn: 作物市场因运输担忧和中美贸易担忧而涨跌互现
summary: Crop markets were mixed Friday amid lingering tensions in the Black Sea and Strait of Hormuz, as well as concerns over US trade ties with China.

title: CoreLogic Tweaks Terms on Struggling Debt Sale, Boosts Loan
title_cn: CoreLogic 调整了陷入困境的债务出售条款，增加了贷款
summary: CoreLogic Inc. amended the terms of its roughly $5.3 billion debt offering and shifted part of the funding to loans from bonds after struggling with lukewarm investor demand.

title: How New PM Andy Burnham Affects Your Money and UK Markets: Live Q&A
title_cn: 新首相安迪·伯纳姆如何影响您的资金和英国市场：现场问答
summary: Bloomberg reporters answer your questions about the UK’s new prime minister Andy Burnham and what his policies mean for your money and markets in a Live Q&A on Tuesday, July 16 at 2 p.m. BST.

title: Wild Weather Disrupts Copper Mines and Ports in Central Chile
title_cn: 恶劣天气扰乱了智利中部的铜矿和港口
summary: Copper mines and ports in central Chile curtailed some operations in the face of a powerful winter storm, while major mining installations in the north remained unaffected.

title: What Is Moonshot AI? Why China’s New Model Is Roiling Markets
title_cn: 什么是登月人工智能？为什么中国的新模式搅动市场
summary: Chinese startup Moonshot AI released a new artificial-intelligence model on July 17 that drew global attention both for its powerful capabilities and for sending stock markets reeling around the world.

title: China’s Moonshot Unveils AI Model, Fueling Tech Rout
title_cn: 中国的登月计划推出人工智能模型，助推技术溃败
summary: Chinese AI pioneer Moonshot unveiled a new model that it claims performs on par with some of the top-tier platforms from OpenAI and Anthropic PBC, the latest sign that the Asian country’s artificial intelligence labs are closing a technology gap with the US.

title: Meta in Talks to Sell Computing Power to Anthropic
title_cn: Meta 正在洽谈向 Anthropic 出售计算能力
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is in early discussions to lease computing power from its data centers to Anthropic PBC, according to people familiar with the matter, an opportunity for the social media giant to build a new business around its heavy investment in AI infrastructure.

title: Valve’s 14-Year Journey to Make the Steam Machine
title_cn: Valve 14 年蒸汽机制造之旅
summary: The company first began laying the groundwork for this year’s hardware way back in 2012

title: Sateliot Expands Funding to Offer Satellite Service to Phones
title_cn: Sateliot 扩大融资规模，为手机提供卫星服务
summary: Satellite startup Sateliot is seeking to boost an ongoing fundraising round to as much as €150 million ($172 million), about a 50% increase as the Spanish company aims to offer satellite connectivity directly to smartphones.

title: Apple in Early Settlement Talks With DOJ Over Antitrust Case
title_cn: 苹果公司正在与司法部就反垄断案件进行早期和解谈判
summary: Apple Inc. and the US Justice Department are in early discussions about settling a 2024 lawsuit that alleges the iPhone maker violated antitrust laws.

title: ASML to Pay One-Time €20,000 Bonus to Staff as AI Propels Demand
title_cn: 随着人工智能推动需求，ASML 将向员工一次性支付 20,000 欧元奖金
summary: ASML Holding NV will give employees globally a one-time €20,000 ($22,862) bonus, joining other firms in the chip industry to offer payouts as artificial intelligence demand fuels record sales.

title: Bethesda Announces New ‘Fallout’ Roadmap Following Xbox Reset
title_cn: 贝塞斯达 (Bethesda) 宣布 Xbox 重置后新的《辐射》路线图
summary: The studio confirmed development on ‘Fallout 5’ and a new game with Obsidian Entertainment

title: Netflix Shares Tumble Most in Four Years on Slowing Growth
title_cn: Netflix 股价因增长放缓而跌幅四年来最大
summary: Netflix Inc. shares fell the most in more than four years after the company forecast a second consecutive quarter of slowing sales growth, contributing to investor anxiety about the streaming giant’s future.

title: Spain, Portugal Data Center Boom Faces Electrical Grid Bottlenecks
title_cn: 西班牙、葡萄牙数据中心繁荣面临电网瓶颈
summary: Spain and Portugal are experiencing a significant data center boom, but constraints around electrical grid capacity, network access and permitting are slowing the pace of new project development.

title: AI-Based Businesses Are Diversifying and Rejecting AI Model Monogamy
title_cn: 基于人工智能的企业正在多元化并拒绝人工智能模式一夫一妻制
summary: Businesses that depend on any one AI model are vulnerable, so they’re adapting

title: China Can Still Win the AI Race With Inferior Technology
title_cn: 中国仍能以劣势技术赢得人工智能竞赛
summary: It’s about economics, power as well as engineering.

title: Xi Seeks Global AI Sway as Surging Chinese Models Spur Alarm
title_cn: 中国模式崛起敲响警钟，习近平谋求全球人工智能影响力
summary: President Xi Jinping used the rise of China’s AI models to stake his claim on shaping the technology’s global rules, even as their growing power stirs security concerns in Washington and Beijing alike.

title: China to Impose Consumption Tax on Solar and Lithium Batteries
title_cn: 中国将对太阳能和锂电池征收消费税
summary: China plans to end a decade-long consumption tax exemption for solar and lithium-ion batteries, marking a policy shift as Beijing seeks to rein in intense competition in the industries central to the clean-energy transition.

title: The Odyssey: Christopher Nolan Movie Stars Zendaya, Matt Damon in Homer Epic
title_cn: 奥德赛：克里斯托弗·诺兰电影明星赞达亚、马特·达蒙在荷马史诗中
summary: The Odyssey hits theaters on Friday and is expected to bring in roughly $100 million in its opening weekend.

title: Japan’s Nikkei 225 Enters Correction on Fears AI Rally Overdone
title_cn: 日本日经 225 指数因担心人工智能反弹过度而进入修正
summary: Japan’s Nikkei 225 Stock Average tumbled to close more than 10% below its June 25 peak, a move termed as a technical correction, amid concerns the global artificial intelligence rally may be stretched.

title: Chipmaker Kioxia’s Market Value Halves From Peak on AI Selloff
title_cn: 芯片制造商 Kioxia 的市值因人工智能抛售而从峰值减半
summary: Japanese memory chipmaker Kioxia Holdings Corp.’s market capitalization halved in just a month since becoming the nation’s most valuable company, on growing concerns the AI-driven rally in the sector has gone too far.

title: SoftBank Plans New ¥60 Billion Bond After Retail, Overseas Deals
title_cn: 软银计划在零售和海外交易后发行 600 亿日元新债券
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. plans to sell about ¥60 billion ($369 million) of notes to institutional investors in Japan this month after domestic retail and foreign-currency bond offerings earlier this year.

title: Z.AI Set to Be First China AI Firm With $1 Billion Annual Sales
title_cn: Z.AI 将成为中国首家年销售额突破 10 亿美元的人工智能公司
summary: Z.AI is on track for annual recurring revenue of $1 billion, a significant ramp-up for an enterprise-focused AI startup trying to fend off a host of rivals in an intensely competitive Chinese field.

title: Xi Promises AI for All in Debut at China’s Top Tech Summit
title_cn: 习近平在中国顶级科技峰会上首次承诺“全民人工智能”
summary: President Xi Jinping hailed China’s progress in developing low-cost artificial intelligence, pressing his personal imprint on the country’s rapidly expanding global influence to call for a more open technological order.

title: Trump Sows US Election Doubts in Speech Before Midterms
title_cn: 特朗普在中期选举前的演讲中播撒美国大选疑虑
summary: President Donald Trump devoted a prime-time address to reviving unsubstantiated claims that the 2020 election was stolen and raising doubts about the security of the upcoming midterms, turning his attention to a years-long grievance at a perilous moment for his presidency.

title: Reform UK Pitches Donors for More Cash, Citing Security Risk
title_cn: 英国改革以安全风险为由向捐助者寻求更多现金
summary: A close ally of Nigel Farage said his Reform UK party is spending at a rate of more than £7 million ($9.4 million) a year to keep the party’s leader and other figures safe, as it pitched for more funding during a probe into the party’s finances.

title: Trump’s Media Firm to Sell Traders Fast Access to His Posts
title_cn: 特朗普的媒体公司向交易者出售快速访问他的帖子的权限
summary: President Donald Trump’s media company wants traders and investors to pay for real-time access to Truth Social posts from the social media platform’s “highest-ranking” accounts.

title: Senate Crypto Talks Hit Turbulence as Window for Passage Narrows
title_cn: 参议院加密货币谈判遭遇动荡，通道窗口缩小
summary: Senate efforts to pass a landmark cryptocurrency bill hit a snag this week as Democratic negotiators indicated they don’t yet support the latest GOP framework and some members balked at their narrowing window to act.

title: IMF, US to Provide Technical Help for Colombian Fiscal Reset
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织和美国将为哥伦比亚财政重置提供技术帮助
summary: Colombia’s incoming government will get technical assistance from the International Monetary Fund and the US Treasury as it seeks to rein in the fiscal deficit, Vice President-elect José Manuel Restrepo said.

title: Hungary to Overhaul Corporate Taxes, Penalize Polluters
title_cn: 匈牙利将改革企业税并惩罚污染者
summary: Hungary plans to broaden the corporate tax base, ending “selective” levies of the Viktor Orban-era that penalized certain companies and hiking the burden on polluters, Prime Minister Peter Magyar said.

title: Carney’s Gordie Howe Bridge Deal Splits 50% of Net Revenue for 15 Years
title_cn: 卡尼 (Carney) 的 Gordie Howe Bridge 交易将在 15 年内分配 50% 的净收入
summary: Canada and the US agreed to split the profit from a new bridge between Ontario and Michigan for 15 years — with no provision to cover Canada’s debt-service costs on the project, according to a copy of the pact seen by Bloomberg News.

title: Germany, France to Draw Up Roadmap on China Trade Imbalances
title_cn: 德法将制定应对中国贸易失衡路线图
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz said widening trade imbalances between the European Union and China must be addressed as Germany and France aligned more closely on a firmer stance on the world’s No. 2 economy.

title: Ghana Mining Law Revamp Could Complicate Gold Fields’s Lease Renewal
title_cn: 加纳采矿法改革可能会使金矿的租约续签变得复杂
summary: Ghana is preparing its first sweeping overhaul of mining legislation in two decades, slashing the length of time companies can operate mines in Africa’s largest gold producer without renewing their rights.

title: Trump Tax Leaker Littlejohn Loses Appeal of Prison Sentence
title_cn: 特朗普税务泄密者利特尔约翰对入狱判决上诉失败
summary: Charles Littlejohn, the former Internal Revenue Service contractor who leaked tax information about President Donald Trump and thousands of other wealthy Americans, lost an appeal of his five-year prison sentence.

title: Burnham Says He’ll Be a Pro-Business PM in London Speech
title_cn: 伯纳姆在伦敦演讲中表示他将成为亲商界首相
summary: Andy Burnham said he’ll be a pro-business prime minister, in his first speech since formally winning an uncontested race to lead the governing Labour Party.

title: Ukraine Says It Hit Russia’s Yanos Oil Refinery Thursday
title_cn: 乌克兰称周四袭击了俄罗斯亚诺斯炼油厂
summary: Ukrainian forces struck the oil refinery in Yaroslavl, northeast of Moscow, on Thursday, as drone attacks deepen fuel shortages across Russia.

title: US, Iran Step Up Attacks as Fears Grow of Return to Full War
title_cn: 由于担心全面战争加剧，美国和伊朗加强袭击
summary: The US and Iran intensified their attacks beyond military targets during a sixth straight day of hostilities, increasing fears of a return to full war with no agreement reached over the Strait of Hormuz.

title: China Lauds US Restoration of Hong Kong Privileges Trump Revoked
title_cn: 中国赞扬美国恢复特朗普取消的香港特权
summary: The US restored privileges for Hong Kong that President Donald Trump revoked in 2020, in his first term, triggering praise from China, which described the move as an important step toward improving bilateral ties.

title: Democratic Lawmakers Urge ‘Impartial’ Review of Fox-Roku Deal
title_cn: 民主党议员敦促对 Fox-Roku 交易进行“公正”审查
summary: A group of Democratic members of Congress led by Massachusetts Senator Elizabeth Warren raised alarm bells about Fox Corp.’s pending $22 billion acquisition of Roku Inc. in a letter sent to the Justice Department on Thursday.

title: Yale Leader Blasted by Faculty for Negotiating With Trump’s DOJ
title_cn: 耶鲁大学领导人因与特朗普司法部谈判而遭到教职人员的猛烈抨击
summary: Yale President Maurie McInnis has largely avoided the turmoil that has engulfed her counterparts at Columbia, Harvard and Brown universities and toppled multiple university leaders.

title: EU Unveils Banking Revamp to Answer Trump’s Deregulation
title_cn: 欧盟推出银行业改革以回应特朗普的放松管制
summary: The European Union unveiled a sweeping package to tackle inefficiencies, barriers and national biases that have dogged its banks for decades, seizing on concerns about growth and competitiveness to take on contentious issues like deposit insurance and the free flow of capital across the bloc’s borders.

title: Mamdani Rejects Pay Hike to $305,800 Approved by Lawmakers
title_cn: Mamdani 拒绝立法者批准的加薪至 305,800 美元
summary: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani said he’ll forgo a pay increase approved by City Council members as they voted to give themselves their first salary bump in a decade.

title: UN Sanctions Congo Rebels as Trump-Backed Peace Deal Languishes
title_cn: 特朗普支持的和平协议陷入困境，联合国制裁刚果叛军
summary: The United Nations sanctioned six rebel leaders and two armed groups in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo, piling pressure on actors in a 30-year conflict that shows little sign of ending.

title: Global Powers Ramp Up Efforts to Avert Another Massacre in Sudan
title_cn: 全球大国加大努力避免苏丹再次发生大屠杀
summary: The Group of Seven nations called on rebel forces in Sudan to halt any actions that may lead to atrocities in the city of El-Obeid, adding to growing international pressure to avoid another massacre in the North African nation.
